context: Tests whether the agent builds the React attribution dashboard with the correct data-fetching setup, KPI cards, visualizations, model comparison, and correctly documents multi-touch revenue discrepancy handling, model explainers, and channel segmentation approach.

checklist.name: SWR for data fetching
checklist.description: AttributionDashboard.tsx uses useSWR (from the 'swr' package) for data fetching rather than useEffect/fetch or another library

checklist.name: SWR refresh interval
checklist.description: SWR is configured with refreshInterval of 3600000 (1 hour in milliseconds)

checklist.name: Default model is position-based
checklist.description: The default selected attribution model is 'position-based' (useState default or equivalent initialisation)

checklist.name: Default period is 30d
checklist.description: The default selected time period is '30d' rather than '7d' or another value

checklist.name: Four KPI cards
checklist.description: Dashboard includes all four KPI summary cards: Total Attributed Revenue, Total Ad Spend, Blended ROAS, and New Customer CAC

checklist.name: Customer journey visualization
checklist.description: Dashboard includes a Sankey chart or flow/path visualization component for common customer journey sequences

checklist.name: Model comparison section
checklist.description: Dashboard includes a section (component or UI element) that shows how different attribution models compare for the same orders

checklist.name: Model explainers in UI
checklist.description: dashboard-spec.md includes plain-language explainer text for at least 3 attribution models (describing what each model does for a non-technical audience)

checklist.name: Multi-touch revenue disclosure
checklist.description: dashboard-spec.md explicitly documents that per-channel attributed revenue sum can exceed actual total revenue and that both figures are shown in the UI

checklist.name: Channel + source segmentation
checklist.description: dashboard-spec.md or AttributionDashboard.tsx indicates that channel metrics are broken down by both channel AND source (not channel alone)

checklist.name: New vs returning revenue split
checklist.description: Channel metrics include separate fields or display for new customer revenue and returning customer revenue

checklist.name: Journey path limit
checklist.description: dashboard-spec.md states that the journey path query limit is 20 (top 20 paths by revenue)

checklist.name: Nightly precompute strategy
checklist.description: dashboard-spec.md mentions that aggregated metrics are precomputed nightly (or on a scheduled basis) into a summary table rather than queried directly from raw events
